purpose: Prerequisite videos for Grade 4 NCERT Chapter 9: Equal Groups
description: Videos covering: repeated addition, skip counting, and grouping objects as foundations for multiplication

videos.title: Repeated Addition | Adding the Same Number Again and Again
videos.description: Learn how adding the same number many times is called repeated addition. 5 + 5 + 5 = 15 is adding 5 three times. This is the foundation of multiplication!
learningObjectives: Understand repeated addition as adding the same number

videos.title: Skip Counting by 2s, 3s, 5s, and 10s | Counting in Groups
videos.description: Learn to count by skipping numbers! Count by 2s (2, 4, 6, 8...), by 5s (5, 10, 15, 20...) and by 10s. Skip counting helps you multiply faster!
learningObjectives: Use skip counting to find totals quickly
followUpTopics: Arrays and skip counting for multiplication

videos.title: Grouping Objects | Putting Things into Equal Groups
videos.description: Practise putting objects into groups of the same size. If you have 12 apples and put 3 in each basket, how many baskets do you need? Grouping is the start of multiplication!
learningObjectives: Understand that equal groups have the same number in each

usageNotes.purpose: Review repeated addition, skip counting, and grouping before learning multiplication in Chapter 9
usageNotes.recommendationStrategy: Select based on weak concepts identified in readiness assessment
usageNotes.sequencing: Repeated addition → Skip counting → Grouping objects
